lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਦੁਖਨਿ ਨਾਸੁ ਸੁਖਦਾਯਕੁ ਸੂਰਉ ਜੋ ਧਰਤ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਬਸਤ ਤਿਹ ਨੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: fun dukhan naas sukhadaayak soorau jo dharat dhiaan basat tih nere |
lines.english: He is the Spiritual Hero who destroys pain and brings peace. Whoever meditates on Him, dwells near Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਰਣ ਤਰਣ ਸਮ੍ਰਥੁ ਕਲਿਜੁਗਿ ਸੁਨਤ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਸਬਦ ਜਿਸੁ ਕੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: taaran taran samrath kalijug sunat samaadh sabad jis kere |
lines.english: The All-powerful Guru is the Boat to carry us across in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga. Hearing the Word of His Shabad, we are transported into Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਉ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਮੁਖੁ ਦੇਖਤ ਅਘ ਜਾਹਿ ਪਰੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: poorau purakh ridai har simarat mukh dekhat agh jaeh parere |
lines.english: He is the Perfect Primal Being, who meditates in remembrance on the Lord within his heart; seeing His Face, sins run away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਮੁਖੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਗਰੂ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: guroo mukh dekh garoo sukh paayau |
lines.english: Gazing upon the Face of the Guru, I find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਚਾਹਤ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ॥੫॥੯॥
lines.translit: jau har budh ridh sidh chaahat guroo guroo gur kar man mere |5|9|
lines.english: If you long for wisdom, wealth, spiritual perfection and properity, O my mind, dwell upon the Guru, the Guru, the Guru. ||5||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਭੋ ਮਨ ਠਉਰ ਬਸੋ ਰਸ ਬਾਸਨ ਸਿਉ ਜੁ ਦਹੰ ਦਿਸਿ ਧਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: pooran bho man tthaur baso ras baasan siau ju dahan dis dhaayau |
lines.english: My mind has become perfect; it dwells in the Lord's Place; it had been wandering in all directions, in its desire for tastes and pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਤੀ ਜੁ ਪਿਆਸ ਪਿਊਸ ਪਿਵੰਨ ਕੀ ਬੰਛਤ ਸਿਧਿ ਕਉ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਿਲਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: hutee ju piaas piaoos pivan kee banchhat sidh kau bidh milaayau |
lines.english: I was thirsty, yearning to drink in the Nectar; to fulfill that wish, the Guru laid out the way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਵਾਲੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਪੁਰੀ ਸਮ ਜਲੵਨ ਤੀਰਿ ਬਿਪਾਸ ਬਨਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: gobind vaal gobind puree sam jalayan teer bipaas banaayau |
lines.english: Goindwal is the City of God, built on the bank of the Beas River.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਯਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਬਰਖਨ ਕੋ ਸੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਮੁਖੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਗਰੂ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਯਉ ॥੬॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: gyau dukh door barakhan ko su guroo mukh dekh garoo sukh paayau |6|10|
lines.english: The pains of so many years have been taken away; gazing upon the Face of the Guru, I find peace. ||6||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਅਉ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਚਰੰਨ ਅਘੰਨ ਹਰੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur keenee kripaa har naam deeo jis dekh charan aghan haryau |
lines.english: The Guru was kind, and blessed me with the Lord's Name. Gazing upon His Feet, my sins were dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਮਰਥ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਿਰਿ ਹਥੁ ਧਰੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: samarath guroo sir hath dharyau |
lines.english: The All-powerful Guru placed His hand upon my head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਸਿ ਬਾਸੁਰ ਏਕ ਸਮਾਨ ਧਿਆਨ ਸੁ ਨਾਮ ਸੁਨੇ ਸੁਤੁ ਭਾਨ ਡਰੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: nis baasur ek samaan dhiaan su naam sune sut bhaan ddaryau |
lines.english: Night and day, the Guru meditates on the One Lord; hearing His Name, the Messenger of Death is scared away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਦਾਸੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਕੀਯਉ ਸਮਰਥ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਿਰਿ ਹਥੁ ਧਰੵਉ ॥੭॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: raamadaas guroo har sat keeyau samarath guroo sir hath dharyau |7|11|
lines.english: Guru Raam Daas recognized the Lord as True; the All-powerful Guru placed His hand upon His head. ||7||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਨਿ ਦਾਸ ਸੁ ਆਸ ਜਗਤ੍ਰ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੀ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਭੇਟਿ ਪਰਸੁ ਕਰੵਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhan daas su aas jagatr guroo kee paaras bhett paras karyau |
lines.english: So speaks the Lord's slave: Guru Raam Daas placed His Faith in Guru Amar Daas, the Guru of the World; touching the Philosopher's Stone, He was transformed into the Philosopher's Stone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੀ ਰਾਖੀ ਲਾਜ ਭਗਤ ਪ੍ਰਹਿਲਾਦ ਕੀ ਹਰਨਾਖਸ ਫਾਰੇ ਕਰ ਆਜ ॥
lines.translit: jaisee raakhee laaj bhagat prahilaad kee haranaakhas faare kar aaj |
lines.english: God saved the honor of the devotee Prahlaad, when Harnaakhash tore him apart with his claws.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਦਾਸ ਭਾਟ ਕੀ ਲਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: ab raakhahu daas bhaatt kee laaj |
lines.english: Now, please preserve the honor of Your humble slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਦ੍ਰੋਪਤੀ ਲਾਜ ਰਖੀ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਛੀਨਤ ਬਸਤ੍ਰ ਦੀਨ ਬਹੁ ਸਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: fun dropatee laaj rakhee har prabh jee chheenat basatr deen bahu saaj |
lines.english: And the Dear Lord God saved the honor of Dropadi; when her clothes were stripped from her, she was blessed with even more.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਦਾਮਾ ਅਪਦਾ ਤੇ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਗਨਿਕਾ ਪੜ੍ਹਤ ਪੂਰੇ ਤਿਹ ਕਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: sodaamaa apadaa te raakhiaa ganikaa parrhat poore tih kaaj |
lines.english: Sudaamaa was saved from misfortune; and Ganikaa the prostitute - when she chanted Your Name, her affairs were perfectly resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਕਲਜੁਗ ਹੋਇ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਦਾਸ ਭਾਟ ਕੀ ਲਾਜ ॥੮॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: sree satigur suprasan kalajug hoe raakhahu daas bhaatt kee laaj |8|12|
lines.english: O Great True Guru, if it pleases You, please save the honor of Your slave in this Dark Age of kali Yuga. ||8||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੋਲਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jholanaa |
lines.english: Jholnaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਪੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀਅਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: guroo gur guroo gur guroo jap praaneeahu |
lines.english: Chant Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, O mortal beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਅਪੈ ਰਸਨਿ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਰਸੈ ਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨੀਅਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad har har japai naam nav nidh apai rasan ahinis rasai sat kar jaaneeahu |
lines.english: Chant the Shabad, the Word of the Lord, Har, Har; the Naam, the Name of the Lord, brings the nine treasures. With your tongue, taste it, day and night, and know it as true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰੰਗ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਹਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਅੰਨ ਮਾਰਗ ਤਜਹੁ ਭਜਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੵਾਨੀਅਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: fun prem rang paaeeai guramukheh dhiaaeeai an maarag tajahu bhajahu har gayaaneeahu |
lines.english: Then, you shall obtain His Love and Affection; become Gurmukh, and meditate on Him. Give up all other ways; vibrate and meditate on Him, O spiritual people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਚਨ ਗੁਰ ਰਿਦਿ ਧਰਹੁ ਪੰਚ ਭੂ ਬਸਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਕੁਲ ਉਧਰਹੁ ਦ੍ਵਾਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਨੀਅਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: bachan gur rid dharahu panch bhoo bas karahu janam kul udharahu dvaar har maaneeahu |
lines.english: Enshrine the Word of the Guru's Teachings within your heart, and overpower the five passions. Your life, and your generations, shall be saved, and you shall be honored at the Lord's Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਤ ਸਭ ਸੁਖ ਇਤ ਉਤ ਤੁਮ ਬੰਛਵਹੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਪੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀਅਹੁ ॥੧॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jau ta sabh sukh it ut tum banchhavahu guroo gur guroo gur guroo jap praaneeahu |1|13|
lines.english: If you desire all the peace and comforts of this world and the next, then chant Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, O mortal beings. ||1||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਗੁਨ ਜਾਨੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਧਰਹੁ ਧੵਾਨੁ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਬਚਨ ਗੁਰ ਰਿਦੈ ਧਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: agam gun jaan nidhaan har man dharahu dhayaan ahinis karahu bachan gur ridai dhar |
lines.english: Know that the Lord is the Treasure of Excellence. Enshrine Him in your mind, and meditate on Him. Enshrine the Word of the Guru's Teachings within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਪਿ ਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guroo gur guroo gur guroo jap sat kar |
lines.english: Chant Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, and know Him as true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੁਨਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਲ ਬਿਮਲ ਅਥਾਹ ਮਜਨੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਤਰਹੁ ਨਾਮ ਸਚ ਰੰਗ ਸਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: fun guroo jal bimal athaah majan karahu sant gurasikh tarahu naam sach rang sar |
lines.english: Then, cleanse yourself in the Immaculate and Unfathomable Water of the Guru; O Gursikhs and Saints, cross over the Ocean of Love of the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਜਪੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਰਸਿ ਕਰਤ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa niravair nirankaar nirbhau japai prem gurasabad ras karat drirr bhagat har |
lines.english: Meditate lovingly forever on the Lord, free of hate and vengeance, Formless and Fearless; lovingly savor the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and implant devotional worship of the Lord deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਗਧ ਮਨ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਤਜਹੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਜਹੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜਪੁ ਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ॥੨॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: mugadh man bhram tajahu naam guramukh bhajahu guroo gur guroo gur guroo jap sat kar |2|14|
lines.english: O foolish mind, give up your doubts; as Gurmukh, vibrate and meditate on the Naam. Chant Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, Guru, and know Him as true. ||2||14||
